\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
  \setlength{\topsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\partopsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\parsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}%
}}
\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
# Picture in ADA

# Ensure summer is a factor
USSteamCoEstim$summer_fact <- factor(USSteamCoEstim$summer, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes"))

# Define custom colors
summer_colors <- c("No" = "#00338D", "Yes" = "#BC204B")

# Base plot with manual color scale and separate regression lines
p <- ggplot(USSteamCoEstim, aes(x = production, y = revenue, color = summer_fact)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = summer_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  labs(x = "Production", y = "Revenue", color = "Summer")

p
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
\par\addvspace{\topsep}


\noindent Note the special operator \ttblue{|}, that can be expressed as 'given the value of'. To call this relationship, we use
